name: silcrow
description: Silcrow — Agency Helper. Scaffold a hierarchical agency: a disciplined multi-agent organization with ADR decision tracking, async-auditor registrar, canonical/operational artifact discipline, and multi-unit support. Four skills: silcrow-init (create an agency), silcrow-add-unit (add a new unit to an existing agency), silcrow-add-agent (add a new agent to an existing unit, Lead-only), silcrow-update (sync an agency to the plugin's current canonical state).
